title: Tip Calculator
shortDescription: Calculate tip and total from a bill amount and tip rate, including split-per-person results.
metaDescription: Calculate tip, final total, and per-person share from a bill amount and chosen tip rate.
intro: Enter the bill amount, choose a tip rate, and get the tip, total, and split amount immediately.
overview:
Use this calculator to add a tip to a restaurant bill, taxi fare, salon visit, or any service charge that is based on a percentage. You can also split the final amount between several people and see each person’s share without doing the math yourself.

The result shows the base amount, the tip value, and the final total so you can check the numbers before paying. If you split the bill, the per-person amount is calculated from the full total, which helps when the tip should be shared evenly across the group.
howItWorks: Select or type the tip percentage.
Choose how many people will split the total, if needed.
Review the tip amount, final total, and per-person share.

useCases.title: Restaurant bill after dinner
useCases.description: Add 10%, 15%, or 20% to a dining bill and see the full amount before paying.

useCases.title: Split a group meal
useCases.description: Divide the final total across friends so everyone knows their share, including tip.

useCases.title: Service appointment payment
useCases.description: Work out the tip for a haircut, massage, or other service where the bill does not include gratuity.

useCases.title: Travel and taxi expenses
useCases.description: Estimate a fair final payment for rides, deliveries, or similar services with a percentage-based tip.

examples.title: Dinner bill with standard tip
examples.description: Shows the added tip and the final amount for a typical restaurant bill.

examples.title: Split among four people
examples.description: Useful when one bill needs to be divided evenly after adding gratuity.

examples.title: Round-number service bill
examples.description: A simple case for service payments where a clear percentage is preferred.

faq.question: Does the tip percentage apply before or after tax?
faq.answer: This calculator applies the percentage to the bill amount you enter. If you want tip on a taxed total, enter that final amount as the base.

faq.question: How is the per-person share calculated?
faq.answer: The split is based on the final total after tip is added, then divided by the number of people you enter.

faq.question: Can I enter a decimal tip rate?
faq.answer: Yes. You can use values such as 12.5% when you want a more precise amount.

faq.question: Why does the result differ from a receipt?
faq.answer: Restaurants may round line items, apply gratuity rules, or include tax differently. Match the base amount to the same figure used on the receipt.

seo.title: Tip Calculator for Bills
